prompt: 我们的 SaaS 产品需要加一个团队协作功能，用户可以在项目里 @mention 队友然后自动发通知。这个功能优先级很高，Q2 就要上线

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Output contains a structured intake brief with clearly labeled sections

assertions.name: classifies-work-type
assertions.description: Correctly classifies work as 'New Feature' (not enhancement, not new product)

assertions.name: recommends-entry-phase
assertions.description: Recommends starting at specification phase (01-specification) since requirements need defining

assertions.name: selects-workflow
assertions.description: Selects agile-sprint workflow (SaaS product, Q2 deadline, iterative nature)

assertions.name: identifies-risks
assertions.description: Identifies at least one relevant risk (e.g., notification infrastructure, @mention parsing, Q2 timeline pressure)

assertions.name: proposes-skill-path
assertions.description: Proposes a multi-step skill path (not just 'start coding')

assertions.name: asks-before-proceeding
assertions.description: Asks for user approval before starting implementation
